# LLM Agents Ecosystem Handbook — full index

> A practical operating manual for building, evaluating, securing, and shipping modern LLM agent systems. Use this index to navigate the repository when reading as an LLM. Each entry pairs a path with a short summary so you can pick what to load.

## Top-level

- [README.md](README.md): repo identity, modern agent stack, learning paths, framework matrix, provider ecosystem, merged knowledge areas
- [llms.txt](llms.txt): concise index for coding agents
- [.env.example](.env.example): env vars for provider abstraction (24+ providers)
- [requirements.txt](requirements.txt): minimal Python deps used by sample utilities
- [MIGRATION_AND_PROVIDER_EXPANSION_PLAN.md](MIGRATION_AND_PROVIDER_EXPANSION_PLAN.md): 1.0.1 migration record
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md), [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md), [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md), [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md), [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md), [LICENSE](LICENSE)

## Agent OS

- [agent_os/README.md](agent_os/README.md), [agent_os/workspace_layout.md](agent_os/workspace_layout.md)
- [agent_os/agent_identity.md](agent_os/agent_identity.md), [agent_os/memory_layer.md](agent_os/memory_layer.md), [agent_os/skills_layer.md](agent_os/skills_layer.md)
- [agent_os/mcp_layer.md](agent_os/mcp_layer.md), [agent_os/safety_layer.md](agent_os/safety_layer.md), [agent_os/observability_layer.md](agent_os/observability_layer.md)
- [agent_os/examples/](agent_os/examples/): minimal / research / coding workspace examples

## Providers (NEW in 1.0.1)

- [providers/README.md](providers/README.md): families overview + quick start
- [providers/provider_matrix.md](providers/provider_matrix.md): capability comparison across 24+ providers
- [providers/provider_abstraction.md](providers/provider_abstraction.md): LLMProvider interface design
- [providers/router_patterns.md](providers/router_patterns.md): cheap/fast/reasoning/local fallback chains
- [providers/local_models.md](providers/local_models.md): Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, llama.cpp
- [providers/cost_latency_matrix.md](providers/cost_latency_matrix.md), [providers/model_selection_guide.md](providers/model_selection_guide.md)
- [providers/env_vars.md](providers/env_vars.md): every env var read by the abstraction
- [providers/examples/](providers/examples/): openai, anthropic, google, mistral, cohere, groq, together, fireworks, openrouter, deepseek, xai, perplexity, azure_openai, ollama, lmstudio, vllm, router_example
- Code: [utilities/llm_provider.py](utilities/llm_provider.py), [utilities/provider_config.py](utilities/provider_config.py), [utilities/provider_router.py](utilities/provider_router.py), [utilities/provider_errors.py](utilities/provider_errors.py)

## Templates

- [templates/README.md](templates/README.md)
- Identity: [AGENTS.md](templates/AGENTS.md.template), [SOUL.md](templates/SOUL.md.template), [USER.md](templates/USER.md.template)
- Memory: [MEMORY.md](templates/MEMORY.md.template)
- Tools / MCP: [TOOLS.md](templates/TOOLS.md.template), [MCP_SERVER.md](templates/MCP_SERVER.md.template)
- Skills: [SKILL.md](templates/SKILL.md.template)
- Prompts (NEW in 1.0.1): [SYSTEM_PROMPT.md](templates/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md.template), [AGENT_PROMPT.md](templates/AGENT_PROMPT.md.template)
- Design (NEW in 1.0.1): [DESIGN_DOC.md](templates/DESIGN_DOC.md.template), [ADR.md](templates/ADR.md.template)
- Coding agents (NEW in 1.0.1): [CODING_AGENT_TASK.md](templates/CODING_AGENT_TASK.md.template), [REPO_MODERNIZATION_PROMPT.md](templates/REPO_MODERNIZATION_PROMPT.md.template)
- Safety: [GUARDRAILS.md](templates/GUARDRAILS.md.template), [HUMAN_APPROVAL_POLICY.md](templates/HUMAN_APPROVAL_POLICY.md.template)
- Process: [EVAL_PLAN.md](templates/EVAL_PLAN.md.template), [AGENT_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md](templates/AGENT_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md)

## Skills (expanded in 1.0.1)

- [skills/README.md](skills/README.md), [skills/skill_design_guide.md](skills/skill_design_guide.md)
- [skills/skill_taxonomy.md](skills/skill_taxonomy.md), [skills/skill_maturity_model.md](skills/skill_maturity_model.md)
- [skills/skill_packaging.md](skills/skill_packaging.md), [skills/skill_validation.md](skills/skill_validation.md)
- [skills/skill_vs_tool_vs_mcp.md](skills/skill_vs_tool_vs_mcp.md), [skills/security_checklist.md](skills/security_checklist.md)
- [skills/awesome_skills_catalog.md](skills/awesome_skills_catalog.md)
- [skills/catalog/](skills/catalog/): index + categories + 6 curated skills (api-design-reviewer, pr-summarizer, adr-writer, incident-postmortem, sprint-planner, dataset-profiler)
- [skills/examples/](skills/examples/): research-summarizer, repo-auditor, mcp-security-reviewer, agent-memory-curator

## Curated catalog (preserved)

- [agents/](agents/): 100+ agent skeletons
- [docs/](docs/): framework_comparison, beginners_guide, best_practices, roadmap
- [tutorials/](tutorials/): rag, memory, chat-with-X, fine-tuning
- [evaluation_frameworks/](evaluation_frameworks/): Promptfoo, DeepEval, RAGAs, Langfuse, ...
- [complete_apps/](complete_apps/), [utilities/](utilities/), [web_apps/](web_apps/), [notebooks/](notebooks/), [datasets/](datasets/), [design/](design/), [resources/](resources/)
